sections.paragraph: <entryFree id="n58658" key="kolobw/dhs" type="main" opt="n" TEIform="entryFree"> <orth extent="suff" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="orth">κολοβ-ώδης</orth>, <itype lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="itype">ες</itype>, <sense id="n58658.0" n="A" level="1" opt="n" TEIform="sense"> <tr_ opt="n" TEIform="tr">stunted, stumpy</tr_>, <cit TEIform="cit"> <quote_ lang="greek" TEIform="quote">δάκτυλοι</quote_> <bibl n="urn:cts:greekLit:tlg1617.tlg001:51" default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <author TEIform="author">Polem.Phgn.</author> <biblScope TEIform="biblScope">51</biblScope> </bibl> </cit> (v.l.).</sense> </entryFree>
